title: phyllanthus hasskarlianus
intro: Phyllanthus hasskarlianus, also known as Puspu or Puspu Putih, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and supporting liver health. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Phyllanthus hasskarlianus are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
